usage_guidelines.web: Use Inter for all headings and UI text. Reserve JetBrains Mono for code blocks, technical labels, and data displays. Avoid using JetBrains Mono for body text longer than 2-3 sentences.
usage_guidelines.print: For print, ensure JetBrains Mono is embedded as a font. Use Inter for body copy and headings. Maintain minimum 16px base size for body text. Use 1.6 line height for readability in printed materials.
